case_title: MEDIOS, POLICARPIO P. VS SONGALIA, EMMANUEL et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-11-2007 - JUDGMENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK S. VANTREE. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SONGALIA, FLORICEL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-12-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-11-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 SETTLEMENT PENDING; IF NO APPEARANCES, DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE.
